params.prompt: Transform this room image into a cinematic editorial real-estate still. Preserve exact architecture, perspective, walls, windows, door openings, furniture layout, lens realism, and room scale. Maintain believable residential scale for a 12.5 by 11.583333333333334 ft Dream. Soft morning light from exterior window; bedside pendant or table lamp with warm tone. Use a dimmable reading lamp in the nursing/reading corner. A calm, warm Japandi interior tuned for a young family: layered natural materials, low-profile furniture, and a designated cozy work corner. The palette leans warm-neutral with muted earth tones, plenty of horizontal lines and negative space, and carefully placed organic accents (plants, ceramics, woven textures). Scenes should feel uncluttered, tactile and lived-in without visual noise—soft sunlight, warm ambient lighting, and purposeful minimalism throughout. Correct perspective distortion so verticals are vertical and horizontals are level. Derive lighting strictly from visible windows, doors, and practical fixtures. Keep highlights controlled, shadows sculpted, exposure balanced, and detail sharp. Previous failure modes to correct: object_missing.
